name: Acc. Sched. KPI Web Srv. Setup

fields.name: Primary Key
fields.tooltip: This object supports the Microsoft Dynamics NAV infrastructure and is intended only for internal use.

fields.name: Forecasted Values Start
fields.tooltip: Specifies at what point in time forecasted values are shown on the financial-report KPI graphic. The forecasted values are retrieved from the selected general ledger budget.

fields.name: G/L Budget Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the general ledger budget that provides budgeted values to the financial-report KPI web service.

fields.name: Period
fields.tooltip: Specifies the period that the financial-report KPI web service is based on.

fields.name: View By
fields.tooltip: Specifies which time interval the financial-report KPI is shown in.

fields.name: Web Service Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the financial-report KPI web service. This name will be shown under the displayed financial-report KPI.

fields.name: Published
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the financial-report KPI web service has been published. Published web services are listed in the Web Services window.

fields.name: Data Last Updated
fields.tooltip: Specifies the last time data was refreshed through the web service.

fields.name: Data Time To Live (hours)
fields.tooltip: Specifies how long data is stored in Business Central before being refreshed from the service. The longer the duration is the smaller the performance impact.
